dashboard.title: Giveaway Wheel
dashboard.celebrateResult: Celebrate the result or reroll for another pick.
dashboard.collectJoins: Open the giveaway and start collecting chat joins.
dashboard.lockedIn: Locked in. Call it on stream, or reroll if you need another winner.
dashboard.noEntrantsDesc: Open the giveaway and type the entry command in chat to join.
dashboard.noWinnersDesc: Winners will appear here after spinning the wheel.
dashboard.confirmClearDesc: This will remove all {{count}} entrants from the current giveaway. This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.shortcutsWork: Shortcuts work when not typing in text fields

setup.title: Giveaway Setup
setup.followerOnlyDesc: Only followers can enter the giveaway.
setup.subscriberOnlyDesc: Only subscribers can enter the giveaway.
setup.allowDuplicatesDesc: Allow users to enter multiple times.
setup.removeWinnerDesc: Remove the winner from the pool once revealed.
setup.announceWinnerDesc: Post the winner into Twitch chat after the spin.
setup.roleWeightsDesc: Adjust how much each role's entries are weighted in the draw.

settings.title: Settings
settings.configDescription: The most-used controls stay up front. Heavier configuration lives behind expandable panels so the page stays fast to scan during a stream.
settings.sessionIdentityDesc: The title and the two chat commands stream viewers actually see.
settings.spinCountdownHint: Controls how long the audience sees the pre-spin suspense countdown.
settings.eligibilityDesc: Keep the common stream-time rules available, but out of the way when you do not need them.
settings.removeWinnerDescription: Automatically remove the winner from the live entrant pool after each spin.
settings.allowDuplicatesDescription: Allow repeated join commands up to the configured per-user entry cap.
settings.followerOnlyDescription: Require the entrant to follow the channel before they can join.
settings.subscriberOnlyDescription: Restrict the giveaway to current channel subscribers.
settings.announceWinnerDescription: Send the winner message back into Twitch chat after the wheel finishes.
settings.excludeBroadcasterDescription: Disable broadcaster self-entry unless you intentionally want to test from your own account.
settings.roleMultipliersDesc: These weights directly shape the chance preview on the dashboard and the final winner selection.
settings.overridesDesc: Use overrides for sponsor boosts, trusted community members, or permanent blocks.
settings.userOverridesDesc: Override weights or block specific users from entering the giveaway.
settings.testDescription: Add random test entrants to verify the wheel is working correctly.
settings.testEntrantsHint: Add between 1 and 100 random test entrants with random roles.

history.title: Winner History
history.noHistoryDesc: Winners from all your giveaway sessions will appear here.
